measurement_policy: Fresh values are recorded only from executed commands. Historical artifacts are explicitly labeled and are not presented as fresh runs.

fresh_execution.reason: Every shell_command failed before process start with Windows access denied; branch validation will run in a temporary GitHub Actions workflow before PR creation.

backend_requested_full.notes: backend/pytest.ini addopts excludes benchmark, audit, frontend, and slow markers, so this command is not an unfiltered full suite.

clarification.caveat: Precision/recall describe the curated evaluated sets, not an estimate over arbitrary user traffic.

benchmark_inventory.note: These are existing derived-style regression artifacts; they are not the new independent Phase 42 oracle set.

pychrono.current_behavior: skipped when unavailable; manual_required when importable

known_existing_issues.impact: Generated sqlite/cache/node_modules artifacts are not protected and external repository tests may fail.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Add the minimum root .gitignore; no code logic change.

known_existing_issues.impact: Requested goal/ paths do not match repository paths.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Report only; do not move files in this phase.

known_existing_issues.impact: The latest upload replaced the prior project README content.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Report only; restoration is outside Phase 42.

known_existing_issues.impact: python -m pytest backend/tests -q inherits backend/pytest.ini exclusions.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Run and report both requested and unfiltered commands.
Use an isolated branch runner and report exact evidence.

metrics_not_currently_measurable.reason: No representative production traffic corpus or labels exist.
Only curated crafted/negative sets are labeled.

metrics_not_currently_measurable.metric: fresh mean and P95 solve latency on the Windows host
metrics_not_currently_measurable.reason: Local process creation is blocked; remote runner results must be labeled by environment.
